built with pdoc

AoE2ScenarioParser.datasets.techs 

   1from __future__ import annotations
   2
   3from enum import Enum
   4from typing import List
   5
   6from AoE2ScenarioParser.datasets.buildings import BuildingInfo
   7from AoE2ScenarioParser.datasets.trigger_lists import Age, LocalTechnology
   8from AoE2ScenarioParser.helper.list_functions import listify
   9
  10
  11class TechInfo(Enum):
  12    """
  13    This enum class provides information about most of the techs in the game. Information about the
  14    following properties of a tech is found in this class:
  15
  16     - Tech ID
  17     - Icon ID
  18
  19    **Methods**
  20
  21    >>> TechInfo.from_id()
  22    >>> TechInfo.from_icon_id()
  23    >>> TechInfo.unique_techs()
  24    >>> TechInfo.unique_unit_upgrades()
  25    >>> TechInfo.town_center_techs()
  26    >>> TechInfo.blacksmith_techs()
  27    >>> TechInfo.monastery_techs()
  28    >>> TechInfo.university_techs()
  29    >>> TechInfo.eco_techs()
  30    >>> TechInfo.civilization_techs()
  31
  32    **Examples**
  33
  34    >>> TechInfo.LOOM.ID
  35    >>> 22
  36
  37    >>> TechInfo.LOOM.ICON_ID
  38    >>> 6
  39    """
  40
  41    @property
  42    def ID(self) -> int:
  43        """
  44        Returns:
  45            The ID of the specified tech
  46        """
  47        return self.value[0]
  48
  49    @classmethod
  50    def from_id(cls, tech_id: int) -> TechInfo:
  51        """
  52        Get the TechInfo object from its ID
  53
  54        Args:
  55            tech_id: The ID of the tech to get the TechInfo of
  56
  57        Returns:
  58            A TechInfo object of the specified tech ID
  59        """
  60        if tech_id < 0:
  61            raise ValueError(f"{tech_id} is not a valid tech id value")
  62        for x in cls._member_map_.values():
  63            if x.value[0] == tech_id:
  64                return x
  65
  66        raise KeyError(f"A technology with ID '{tech_id}' was not found in the dataset")
  67
  68    @property
  69    def ICON_ID(self) -> int:
  70        """
  71        Returns:
  72            The icon ID of the specified tech
  73        """
  74        return self.value[1]
  75
  76    @classmethod
  77    def from_icon_id(cls, tech_icon_id: int) -> TechInfo:
  78        """
  79        Get the TechInfo object from its icon ID
  80
  81        Args:
  82            tech_icon_id: The icon ID of the tech to get the TechInfo of
  83
  84        Returns:
  85            A TechInfo object of the tech with the specified icon ID
  86        """
  87        if tech_icon_id == -1:
  88            raise ValueError("-1 is not a valid icon_id value")
  89        for x in cls._member_map_.values():
  90            if x.value[1] == tech_icon_id:
  91                return x
  92
  93        raise KeyError(f"A technology with icon id '{tech_icon_id}' was not found in the dataset")
  94
  95    @staticmethod
  96    def unique_techs(
  97            exclude_castle_techs: bool = False,
  98            exclude_imp_techs: bool = False,
  99            include_chronicles: bool = False,
 100    ) -> List[TechInfo]:
 101        """
 102        Get the list of all the unique techs in the game
 103
 104        Args:
 105            exclude_castle_techs: if set to `True`,  exclude the castle age techs
 106            exclude_imp_techs: if set to `True`,  exclude the imperial age techs
 107            include_chronicles: if set to `True`, includes the chronicles techs
 108
 109        Returns:
 110            A list of TechInfo objects which are all the unique techs in the game
 111        """
 112        unique_techs = {
 113            "base": {
 114                "castle_age": [
 115                    TechInfo.ANARCHY,
 116                    TechInfo.ANDEAN_SLING,
 117                    TechInfo.ATLATL,
 118                    TechInfo.BALLISTAS,
 119                    TechInfo.BEARDED_AXE,
 120                    TechInfo.CIRCUMNAVIGATION,
 121                    TechInfo.CHATRAS,
 122                    TechInfo.CILICIAN_FLEET,
 123                    TechInfo.CHIEFTAINS,
 124                    TechInfo.CORVINIAN_ARMY,
 125                    TechInfo.DETINETS,
 126                    TechInfo.FIRST_CRUSADE,
 127                    TechInfo.GRAND_TRUNK_ROAD,
 128                    TechInfo.GREAT_WALL,
 129                    TechInfo.GREEK_FIRE,
 130                    TechInfo.HILL_FORTS,
 131                    TechInfo.HOWDAH,
 132                    TechInfo.HULCHE_JAVELINEERS,
 133                    TechInfo.INQUISITION,
 134                    TechInfo.IRONCLAD,
 135                    TechInfo.KAMANDARAN,
 136                    TechInfo.KASBAH,
 137                    TechInfo.KSHATRIYAS,
 138                    TechInfo.NOMADS,
 139                    TechInfo.MADRASAH,
 140                    TechInfo.MARAUDERS,
 141                    TechInfo.MEDICAL_CORPS,
 142                    TechInfo.PAIKS,
 143                    TechInfo.EUPSEONG,
 144                    TechInfo.PAVISE,
 145                    TechInfo.ROYAL_HEIRS,
 146                    TechInfo.SHATAGNI,
 147                    TechInfo.SILK_ARMOR,
 148                    TechInfo.SIPAHI,
 149                    TechInfo.STEPPE_HUSBANDRY,
 150                    TechInfo.STIRRUPS,
 151                    TechInfo.STRONGHOLD,
 152                    TechInfo.SVAN_TOWERS,
 153                    TechInfo.SZLACHTA_PRIVILEGES,
 154                    TechInfo.THALASSOCRACY,
 155                    TechInfo.TIGUI,
 156                    TechInfo.TUSK_SWORDS,
 157                    TechInfo.WAGENBURG_TACTICS,
 158                    TechInfo.YASAMA,
 159                    TechInfo.YEOMEN,
 160                    TechInfo.BIMARISTAN,
 161                    TechInfo.COILED_SERPENT_ARRAY,
 162                    TechInfo.TUNTIAN,
 163                    TechInfo.RED_CLIFFS_TACTICS,
 164                    TechInfo.FORTIFIED_BASTIONS,
 165                    TechInfo.LAMELLAR_ARMOR,
 166                    TechInfo.MALON,
 167                    TechInfo.HERBALISM,
 168                    TechInfo.CACIQUES,
 169                ],
 170                "imp_age": [
 171                    TechInfo.ARQUEBUS,
 172                    TechInfo.ARTILLERY,
 173                    TechInfo.ATHEISM,
 174                    TechInfo.AZNAURI_CAVALRY,
 175                    TechInfo.BAGAINS,
 176                    TechInfo.BOGSVEIGAR,
 177                    TechInfo.BURGUNDIAN_VINEYARDS,
 178                    TechInfo.CHIVALRY,
 179                    TechInfo.CRENELLATIONS,
 180                    TechInfo.COMITATENSES,
 181                    TechInfo.COUNTERWEIGHTS,
 182                    TechInfo.CUMAN_MERCENARIES,
 183                    TechInfo.FABRIC_SHIELDS,
 184                    TechInfo.FERETERS,
 185                    TechInfo.DOUBLE_CROSSBOW,
 186                    TechInfo.DRILL,
 187                    TechInfo.DRUZHINA,
 188                    TechInfo.HOLCANS,
 189                    TechInfo.FARIMBA,
 190                    TechInfo.FLEMISH_REVOLUTION,
 191                    TechInfo.FORCED_LEVY,
 192                    TechInfo.FRONTIER_GUARDS,
 193                    TechInfo.FUROR_CELTICA,
 194                    TechInfo.GARLAND_WARS,
 195                    TechInfo.HUSSITE_REFORMS,
 196                    TechInfo.KATAPARUTO,
 197                    TechInfo.LECHITIC_LEGACY,
 198                    TechInfo.LOGISTICA,
 199                    TechInfo.MAGHREBI_CAMELS,
 200                    TechInfo.MAHAYANA,
 201                    TechInfo.CITADELS,
 202                    TechInfo.MANIPUR_CAVALRY,
 203                    TechInfo.PAPER_MONEY,
 204                    TechInfo.PERFUSION,
 205                    TechInfo.RECURVE_BOW,
 206                    TechInfo.ROCKETRY,
 207                    TechInfo.HAUBERK,
 208                    TechInfo.SHINKICHON,
 209                    TechInfo.SILK_ROAD,
 210                    TechInfo.SUPREMACY,
 211                    TechInfo.TIMURID_SIEGECRAFT,
 212                    TechInfo.TORSION_ENGINES,
 213                    TechInfo.TOWER_SHIELDS,
 214                    TechInfo.WARWOLF,
 215                    TechInfo.WOOTZ_STEEL,
 216                    TechInfo.BOLT_MAGAZINE,
 217                    TechInfo.MING_GUANG_ARMOR,
 218                    TechInfo.SITTING_TIGER,
 219                    TechInfo.THUNDERCLAP_BOMBS,
 220                    TechInfo.ORDO_CAVALRY,
 221                    TechInfo.BUTALMAPU,
 222                    TechInfo.HUARACAS,
 223                    TechInfo.CURARE,
 224                ],
 225            },
 226            "chronicles": {
 227                "castle_age": [
 228                    TechInfo.SPARABARAS,
 229                    TechInfo.REED_ARROWS,
 230                    TechInfo.TAXIARCHS,
 231                    TechInfo.TRIERARCHIES,
 232                    TechInfo.HELOT_LEVIES,
 233                    TechInfo.XYPHOS,
 234                    TechInfo.VETERAN_CHILIARCHS,
 235                    TechInfo.ENDS_OF_THE_WORLD,
 236                    TechInfo.ODOMANTIAN_RAIDERS,
 237                    TechInfo.DII_PLUNDERERS,
 238                    TechInfo.VADHAVADHA,
 239                    TechInfo.LEAF_HEADED_SHAFTS,
 240                ],
 241                "imp_age": [
 242                    TechInfo.SCYTHED_CHARIOTS,
 243                    TechInfo.SAGARIS,
 244                    TechInfo.EISPHORA,
 245                    TechInfo.DELIAN_LEAGUE,
 246                    TechInfo.AGOGE,
 247                    TechInfo.PELOPONNESIAN_LEAGUE,
 248                    TechInfo.PEZHETAIROI,
 249                    TechInfo.SARISSOPHOROI,
 250                    TechInfo.BESSIAN_METALWORKING,
 251                    TechInfo.PELTASTS,
 252                    TechInfo.VEDIC_TEACHINGS,
 253                    TechInfo.SKANDHAVARAS,
 254                ],
 255            },
 256        }
 257
 258        techs_to_return = []
 259
 260        addons = ["base"]
 261        if include_chronicles:
 262            addons.append("chronicles")
 263
 264        for addon in addons:
 265            if not exclude_castle_techs:
 266                techs_to_return.extend(unique_techs[addon]["castle_age"])
 267            if not exclude_imp_techs:
 268                techs_to_return.extend(unique_techs[addon]["imp_age"])
 269
 270        return techs_to_return
 271
 272    @staticmethod
 273    def unique_unit_upgrades(
 274            exclude_castle_techs: bool = False,
 275            exclude_non_castle_techs: bool = False,
 276            include_chronicles: bool = False,
 277    ) -> List[TechInfo]:
 278        """
 279        Args:
 280            exclude_castle_techs: if set to `False`, excludes the castle unique unit techs from the list of techs returned
 281            exclude_non_castle_techs: if set to `False`, excludes the non castle unique unit techs from the list of techs
 282                returned
 283            include_chronicles: if set to `True`, includes the chronicles techs to the list of techs returned
 284
 285        Returns:
 286            A list of unique unite upgrade tech IDs
 287        """
 288        unique_techs = {
 289            "base": {
 290                "castle": [
 291                    TechInfo.ELITE_ARAMBAI,
 292                    TechInfo.ELITE_BALLISTA_ELEPHANT,
 293                    TechInfo.ELITE_BERSERK,
 294                    TechInfo.ELITE_BOYAR,
 295                    TechInfo.ELITE_CAMEL_ARCHER,
 296                    TechInfo.ELITE_CATAPHRACT,
 297                    TechInfo.ELITE_CENTURION,
 298                    TechInfo.ELITE_CHAKRAM_THROWER,
 299                    TechInfo.ELITE_CHU_KO_NU,
 300                    TechInfo.ELITE_COMPOSITE_BOWMAN,
 301                    TechInfo.ELITE_CONQUISTADOR,
 302                    TechInfo.ELITE_COUSTILLIER,
 303                    TechInfo.ELITE_GBETO,
 304                    TechInfo.ELITE_GENOESE_CROSSBOWMAN,
 305                    TechInfo.ELITE_GHULAM,
 306                    TechInfo.ELITE_HUSKARL,
 307                    TechInfo.ELITE_HUSSITE_WAGON,
 308                    TechInfo.ELITE_JAGUAR_WARRIOR,
 309                    TechInfo.ELITE_JANISSARY,
 310                    TechInfo.ELITE_KAMAYUK,
 311                    TechInfo.ELITE_KARAMBIT_WARRIOR,
 312                    TechInfo.ELITE_KESHIK,
 313                    TechInfo.ELITE_KIPCHAK,
 314                    TechInfo.ELITE_KONNIK,
 315                    TechInfo.ELITE_LEITIS,
 316                    TechInfo.ELITE_LONGBOWMAN,
 317                    TechInfo.ELITE_MAGYAR_HUSZAR,
 318                    TechInfo.ELITE_MAMELUKE,
 319                    TechInfo.ELITE_MANGUDAI,
 320                    TechInfo.ELITE_MONASPA,
 321                    TechInfo.ELITE_OBUCH,
 322                    TechInfo.ELITE_ORGAN_GUN,
 323                    TechInfo.ELITE_PLUMED_ARCHER,
 324                    TechInfo.ELITE_RATHA,
 325                    TechInfo.ELITE_RATTAN_ARCHER,
 326                    TechInfo.ELITE_SAMURAI,
 327                    TechInfo.ELITE_SERJEANT,
 328                    TechInfo.ELITE_SHOTEL_WARRIOR,
 329                    TechInfo.ELITE_TARKAN,
 330                    TechInfo.ELITE_TEUTONIC_KNIGHT,
 331                    TechInfo.ELITE_THROWING_AXEMAN,
 332                    TechInfo.ELITE_URUMI_SWORDSMAN,
 333                    TechInfo.ELITE_WAR_ELEPHANT,
 334                    TechInfo.ELITE_WAR_WAGON,
 335                    TechInfo.ELITE_WOAD_RAIDER,
 336                    TechInfo.ELITE_WHITE_FEATHER_GUARD,
 337                    TechInfo.ELITE_FIRE_ARCHER,
 338                    TechInfo.ELITE_TIGER_CAVALRY,
 339                    TechInfo.ELITE_IRON_PAGODA,
 340                    TechInfo.ELITE_LIAO_DAO,
 341                    TechInfo.ELITE_KONA,
 342                    TechInfo.ELITE_GUECHA_WARRIOR,
 343                    TechInfo.ELITE_BLACKWOOD_ARCHER,
 344                ],
 345                "non_castle": [
 346                    TechInfo.ELITE_CARAVEL,
 347                    TechInfo.ELITE_GENITOUR,
 348                    TechInfo.ELITE_LONGBOAT,
 349                    TechInfo.ELITE_TURTLE_SHIP,
 350                    TechInfo.HOUFNICE,
 351                    TechInfo.IMPERIAL_CAMEL_RIDER,
 352                    TechInfo.IMPERIAL_SKIRMISHER,
 353                    TechInfo.ELITE_SHRIVAMSHA_RIDER,
 354                    TechInfo.WINGED_HUSSAR,
 355                    TechInfo.ELITE_QIZILBASH_WARRIOR,
 356                    TechInfo.SAVAR,
 357                    TechInfo.ELITE_BOLAS_RIDER,
 358                    TechInfo.ELITE_TEMPLE_GUARD,
 359                    TechInfo.ELITE_IBIRAPEMA_WARRIOR,
 360                ],
 361            },
 362            "chronicles": {
 363                "castle": [
 364                    TechInfo.ELITE_IMMORTAL,
 365                    TechInfo.ELITE_STRATEGOS,
 366                    TechInfo.ELITE_HIPPEUS,
 367                    TechInfo.ELITE_COMPANION_CAVALRY,
 368                    TechInfo.ELITE_RHOMPHAIA_WARRIOR,
 369                    TechInfo.ELITE_PATTIYODHA_LONGBOWMAN,
 370                ],
 371                "non_castle": [
 372                    TechInfo.EPHORATE,
 373                    TechInfo.MORAI,
 374                    TechInfo.ELITE_PHALANGITE,
 375                    TechInfo.ELITE_SANNAHYA,
 376                ],
 377            }
 378        }
 379
 380        techs_to_return = []
 381
 382        addons = ["base"]
 383        if include_chronicles:
 384            addons.append("chronicles")
 385
 386        for addon in addons:
 387            if not exclude_castle_techs:
 388                techs_to_return.extend(unique_techs[addon]["castle"])
 389            if not exclude_non_castle_techs:
 390                techs_to_return.extend(unique_techs[addon]["non_castle"])
 391
 392        return techs_to_return
 393
 394    @staticmethod
 395    def town_center_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 396        """
 397        Args:
 398            ages: a list of age IDs (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 399                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 400
 401        Returns:
 402            A list of TechInfo objects which are the blacksmith upgrade techs for the given age
 403        """
 404        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 405
 406        upgrades = {
 407            Age.DARK_AGE: [
 408                TechInfo.LOOM,
 409                TechInfo.FEUDAL_AGE,
 410            ],
 411            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: [
 412                TechInfo.WHEELBARROW,
 413                TechInfo.TOWN_WATCH,
 414                TechInfo.CASTLE_AGE,
 415            ],
 416            Age.CASTLE_AGE: [
 417                TechInfo.HAND_CART,
 418                TechInfo.TOWN_PATROL,
 419                TechInfo.IMPERIAL_AGE,
 420            ],
 421            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: [],
 422        }
 423
 424        techs_to_return = []
 425        for age in ages:
 426            techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age])
 427
 428        return techs_to_return
 429
 430    @staticmethod
 431    def blacksmith_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 432        """
 433        Args:
 434            ages: a list of age IDs (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 435                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 436
 437        Returns:
 438            A list of TechInfo objects which are the blacksmith upgrade techs for the given age
 439        """
 440        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 441
 442        upgrades = {
 443            Age.DARK_AGE: [],
 444            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: [
 445                TechInfo.FORGING,
 446                TechInfo.SCALE_MAIL_ARMOR,
 447                TechInfo.SCALE_BARDING_ARMOR,
 448                TechInfo.FLETCHING,
 449                TechInfo.PADDED_ARCHER_ARMOR,
 450            ],
 451            Age.CASTLE_AGE: [
 452                TechInfo.IRON_CASTING,
 453                TechInfo.CHAIN_MAIL_ARMOR,
 454                TechInfo.CHAIN_BARDING_ARMOR,
 455                TechInfo.BODKIN_ARROW,
 456                TechInfo.LEATHER_ARCHER_ARMOR,
 457            ],
 458            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: [
 459                TechInfo.BLAST_FURNACE,
 460                TechInfo.PLATE_MAIL_ARMOR,
 461                TechInfo.PLATE_BARDING_ARMOR,
 462                TechInfo.BRACER,
 463                TechInfo.RING_ARCHER_ARMOR,
 464            ],
 465        }
 466
 467        techs_to_return = []
 468        for age in ages:
 469            techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age])
 470
 471        return techs_to_return
 472
 473    @staticmethod
 474    def monastery_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 475        """
 476        Args:
 477            ages: The age ID (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 478                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 479
 480        Returns:
 481            A list of TechInfo objects which are the monastery upgrade techs for the given age
 482        """
 483        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 484
 485        upgrades = {
 486            Age.DARK_AGE: [],
 487            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: [],
 488            Age.CASTLE_AGE: [
 489                TechInfo.REDEMPTION,
 490                TechInfo.ATONEMENT,
 491                TechInfo.HERBAL_MEDICINE,
 492                TechInfo.HERESY,
 493                TechInfo.SANCTITY,
 494                TechInfo.FERVOR,
 495                TechInfo.DEVOTION,
 496            ],
 497            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: [
 498                TechInfo.FAITH,
 499                TechInfo.ILLUMINATION,
 500                TechInfo.BLOCK_PRINTING,
 501                TechInfo.THEOCRACY,
 502            ],
 503        }
 504
 505        techs_to_return = []
 506        for age in ages:
 507            techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age])
 508
 509        return techs_to_return
 510
 511    @staticmethod
 512    def university_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 513        """
 514        Args:
 515            ages: The age ID (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 516                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 517
 518        Returns:
 519            A list of TechInfo objects which are the university upgrade techs for the given age
 520        """
 521        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 522
 523        upgrades = {
 524            Age.DARK_AGE: [],
 525            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: [],
 526            Age.CASTLE_AGE: [
 527                TechInfo.MASONRY,
 528                TechInfo.FORTIFIED_WALL,
 529                TechInfo.BALLISTICS,
 530                TechInfo.GUARD_TOWER,
 531                TechInfo.HEATED_SHOT,
 532                TechInfo.CAREENING,
 533                TechInfo.MURDER_HOLES,
 534                TechInfo.CLINKER_CONSTRUCTION,
 535                TechInfo.TREADMILL_CRANE,
 536                TechInfo.SIPHONS,
 537            ],
 538            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: [
 539                TechInfo.ARCHITECTURE,
 540                TechInfo.SIEGE_ENGINEERS,
 541                TechInfo.KEEP,
 542                TechInfo.ARROWSLITS,
 543                TechInfo.DRY_DOCK,
 544                TechInfo.SHIPWRIGHT,
 545                TechInfo.CARVEL_HULL,
 546                TechInfo.INCENDIARIES,
 547                TechInfo.CHEMISTRY,
 548                TechInfo.BOMBARD_TOWER,
 549            ],
 550        }
 551
 552        techs_to_return = []
 553        for age in ages:
 554            techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age])
 555
 556        return techs_to_return
 557
 558    @staticmethod
 559    def eco_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None, buildings: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 560        """
 561        Args:
 562            ages: The age ID (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 563                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 564            buildings: The building ID for which the upgrades are needed. If unspecified, eco upgrades from all
 565                economic buildings (Mill, Mining Camp, Lumber Camp, Town Center and Market) are returned
 566
 567        Returns:
 568            A list of TechInfo objects which are the eco upgrade techs for the given age
 569        """
 570        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 571
 572        if buildings is None:
 573            buildings = [
 574                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID,
 575                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID,
 576                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID,
 577                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID,
 578                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID,
 579            ]
 580        else:
 581            buildings = listify(buildings)
 582
 583        upgrades = {
 584            Age.DARK_AGE: {
 585                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID: [],
 586                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID: [],
 587                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID: [],
 588                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID: [TechInfo.LOOM],
 589                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID: [],
 590            },
 591            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: {
 592                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID: [TechInfo.HORSE_COLLAR, TechInfo.DOMESTICATION],
 593                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.GOLD_MINING, TechInfo.STONE_MINING],
 594                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.DOUBLE_BIT_AXE],
 595                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID: [TechInfo.WHEELBARROW, TechInfo.TOWN_WATCH],
 596                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID: [],
 597            },
 598            Age.CASTLE_AGE: {
 599                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID: [TechInfo.HEAVY_PLOW, TechInfo.PASTORALISM],
 600                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.GOLD_SHAFT_MINING, TechInfo.STONE_SHAFT_MINING],
 601                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.BOW_SAW],
 602                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID: [TechInfo.HAND_CART, TechInfo.TOWN_PATROL],
 603                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID: [TechInfo.COINAGE, TechInfo.CARAVAN]
 604            },
 605            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: {
 606                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID: [TechInfo.CROP_ROTATION, TechInfo.TRANSHUMANCE],
 607                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID: [],
 608                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.TWO_MAN_SAW],
 609                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID: [],
 610                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID: [TechInfo.BANKING, TechInfo.GUILDS],
 611            },
 612        }
 613
 614        techs_to_return = []
 615        for age in ages:
 616            for building in buildings:
 617                techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age][building])
 618
 619        return techs_to_return
 620
 621    @staticmethod
 622    def civilization_techs(include_chronicles: bool = False) -> List[TechInfo]:
 623        """
 624        Args:
 625            include_chronicles: if set to `True`, includes the chronicles techs to the list of techs returned
 626        Returns:
 627            A list of TechInfo objects which represent all civ 'upgrades'. Can be used to detect which civ is being
 628            played by the player using the 'researched technology' condition.
 629        """
 630        base_techs = [
 631            TechInfo.ARMENIANS,
 632            TechInfo.AZTECS,
 633            TechInfo.BENGALIS,
 634            TechInfo.BERBERS,
 635            TechInfo.BOHEMIANS,
 636            TechInfo.BRITONS,
 637            TechInfo.BULGARIANS,
 638            TechInfo.BURGUNDIANS,
 639            TechInfo.BURMESE,
 640            TechInfo.BYZANTINES,
 641            TechInfo.CELTS,
 642            TechInfo.CHINESE,
 643            TechInfo.CUMANS,
 644            TechInfo.DRAVIDIANS,
 645            TechInfo.ETHIOPIANS,
 646            TechInfo.FRANKS,
 647            TechInfo.GEORGIANS,
 648            TechInfo.GOTHS,
 649            TechInfo.GURJARAS,
 650            TechInfo.HINDUSTANIS,
 651            TechInfo.HUNS,
 652            TechInfo.INCA,
 653            TechInfo.ITALIANS,
 654            TechInfo.JAPANESE,
 655            TechInfo.KHMER,
 656            TechInfo.KOREANS,
 657            TechInfo.LITHUANIANS,
 658            TechInfo.MAGYARS,
 659            TechInfo.MALAY,
 660            TechInfo.MALIANS,
 661            TechInfo.MAYA,
 662            TechInfo.MONGOLS,
 663            TechInfo.PERSIANS,
 664            TechInfo.POLES,
 665            TechInfo.PORTUGUESE,
 666            TechInfo.ROMANS,
 667            TechInfo.SARACENS,
 668            TechInfo.SICILIANS,
 669            TechInfo.SLAVS,
 670            TechInfo.SPANISH,
 671            TechInfo.TATARS,
 672            TechInfo.TEUTONS,
 673            TechInfo.TURKS,
 674            TechInfo.VIETNAMESE,
 675            TechInfo.VIKINGS,
 676            TechInfo.SHU,
 677            TechInfo.WU,
 678            TechInfo.WEI,
 679            TechInfo.JURCHENS,
 680            TechInfo.KHITANS,
 681            TechInfo.MAPUCHE,
 682            TechInfo.MUISCA,
 683            TechInfo.TUPI,
 684        ]
 685        chronicles_techs = [
 686            TechInfo.ACHAEMENIDS,
 687            TechInfo.ATHENIANS,
 688            TechInfo.SPARTANS,
 689            TechInfo.MACEDONIANS,
 690            TechInfo.THRACIANS,
 691            TechInfo.PURU,
 692        ]
 693        if include_chronicles:
 694            base_techs.extend(chronicles_techs)
 695        return base_techs
 696
 697    ANARCHY = 16, 33
 698    ANDEAN_SLING = 516, 33
 699    ARBALESTER = 237, 54
 700    ARCHITECTURE = 51, 14
 701    ARQUEBUS = 573, 107
 702    ARROWSLITS = 608, 119
 703    ARSON = 602, 118
 704    ARTILLERY = 10, 107
 705    ATHEISM = 21, 107
 706    ATLATL = 460, 33
 707    ATONEMENT = 319, 93
 708    AZTECS = 543, -1
 709    BAGAINS = 686, 107
 710    BALLISTICS = 93, 25
 711    BANKING = 17, 3
 712    BEARDED_AXE = 83, 33
 713    BERBERS = 583, -1
 714    BOGSVEIGAR = 49, 107
 715    BLAST_FURNACE = 75, 21
 716    BLOCK_PRINTING = 230, 82
 717    BLOODLINES = 435, 110
 718    BODKIN_ARROW = 200, 35
 719    BOMBARD_CANNON = 188, -1
 720    BOMBARD_TOWER = 64, 47
 721    BOW_SAW = 203, 71
 722    BRACER = 201, 37
 723    BRITONS = 529, -1
 724    BULGARIANS = 673, -1
 725    BURMESE = 652, -1
 726    BYZANTINES = 535, -1
 727    CANNON_GALLEON = 37, 0
 728    CAPPED_RAM = 96, 27
 729    CARAVAN = 48, 113
 730    CAREENING = 374, 98
 731    CARRACK = 572, 33
 732    CARTOGRAPHY = 19, 4
 733    CASTLE_AGE = 102, 31
 734    CAVALIER = 209, 78
 735    CELTS = 541, -1
 736    CHAIN_BARDING_ARMOR = 82, 23
 737    CHAIN_MAIL_ARMOR = 76, 22

1204    FORTIFIED_OUTPOST = LocalTechnology.FORTIFIED_OUTPOST, 309
1205    CONSCRIPT_RECRUITMENT_BARRACKS = 1275, 207
1206    MERCENARY_RECRUITMENT_BARRACKS = 1276, 209
1207    BALANCED_RECRUITMENT_BARRACKS = 1277, 208
1208    CONSCRIPT_RECRUITMENT_ARCHERY_RANGE = 1278, 207
1209    MERCENARY_RECRUITMENT_ARCHERY_RANGE = 1279, 209
1210    BALANCED_RECRUITMENT_ARCHERY_RANGE = 1280, 208
1211    CONSCRIPT_RECRUITMENT_STABLE = 1281, 207
1212    MERCENARY_RECRUITMENT_STABLE = 1282, 209
1213    BALANCED_RECRUITMENT_STABLE = 1283, 208
1214    VETERAN_CHILIARCHS = 1284, 164
1215    ENDS_OF_THE_WORLD = 1285, 165
1216    PEZHETAIROI = 1286, 166
1217    SARISSOPHOROI = 1287, 167
1218    ELITE_COMPANION_CAVALRY = 1289, 105
1219    ELITE_PHALANGITE = 1291, 105
1220    ODOMANTIAN_RAIDERS = 1296, 164
1221    DII_PLUNDERERS = 1297, 165
1222    BESSIAN_METALWORKING = 1298, 166
1223    PELTASTS = 1299, 167
1224    ELITE_RHOMPHAIA_WARRIOR = 1301, 105
1225    VADHAVADHA = 1307, 164
1226    LEAF_HEADED_SHAFTS = 1308, 165
1227    VEDIC_TEACHINGS = 1309, 166
1228    SKANDHAVARAS = 1310, 167
1229    DEFENSIVE_EMPLACEMENT = LocalTechnology.DEFENSIVE_EMPLACEMENT, 300
1230    OFFENSIVE_EMPLACEMENT = LocalTechnology.OFFENSIVE_EMPLACEMENT, 301
1231    ELITE_PATTIYODHA_LONGBOWMAN = 1326, 105
1232    ELITE_SANNAHYA = 1328, 105
1233    SC08_ALEXANDER_CUSTOM_TECH = 1332, 299
1234    SC11_ALEXANDER_CUSTOM_TECH = 1333, 299
1235    ELITE_SCYTHIAN_HORSE_ARCHER = 1334, 52
1236    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_20 = 1340, -1
1237    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_21 = 1341, -1
1238    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_22 = 1342, -1
1239    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_23 = 1343, -1
1240    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_24 = 1344, -1
1241    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_25 = 1345, -1
1242    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_26 = 1346, -1
1243    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_27 = 1347, -1
1244    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_28 = 1348, -1
1245    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_29 = 1349, -1
1246    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_30 = 1500, -1
1247    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_31 = 1501, -1
1248    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_32 = 1502, -1
1249    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_33 = 1503, -1
1250    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_34 = 1504, -1
1251    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_35 = 1505, -1
1252    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_36 = 1506, -1
1253    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_37 = 1507, -1
1254    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_38 = 1508, -1
1255    BLANK_TECHNOLOGY_39 = 1509, -1
1256    DEMOLITION_SHIP = 905, 139
1257    FISHING_LINES = 906, 140
1258    CARVEL_HULL = 907, 141
1259    CLINKER_CONSTRUCTION = 908, 142
1260    SIPHONS = 909, 40
1261    INCENDIARIES = 910, 143
1262    CHAMPI_SCOUT_MAKE_AVAILABLE = 1350, 75
1263    CHAMPI_WARRIOR = 1351, 144
1264    ELITE_CHAMPI_WARRIOR = 1352, 145
1265    ELITE_GUECHA_WARRIOR = 1364, 105
1266    HERBALISM = 1365, 33
1267    HUARACAS = 1366, 107
1268    ELITE_KONA = 1376, 105
1269    ELITE_BOLAS_RIDER = 1378, 105
1270    MALON = 1379, 33
1271    BUTALMAPU = 1380, 107
1272    ELITE_WAR_DOG = 1387, 149
1273    ELITE_BLACKWOOD_ARCHER = 1389, 105
1274    ELITE_IBIRAPEMA_WARRIOR = 1391, 105
1275    CACIQUES = 1392, 33
1276    CURARE = 1393, 107
1277    ELITE_TEMPLE_GUARD = 1401, 105
1278    CHAMPI_RUNNER = 1402, 146
1279    CIRCUMNAVIGATION = 1404, 33
1280    MACEDONIANS = 1268, -1
1281    THRACIANS = 1292, -1
1282    PURU = 1302, -1
1283    MAPUCHE = 1361, -1
1284    MUISCA = 1360, -1
1285    TUPI = 1362, -1
class TechInfo(enum.Enum): 
  12class TechInfo(Enum):
  13    """
  14    This enum class provides information about most of the techs in the game. Information about the
  15    following properties of a tech is found in this class:
  16
  17     - Tech ID
  18     - Icon ID
  19
  20    **Methods**
  21
  22    >>> TechInfo.from_id()
  23    >>> TechInfo.from_icon_id()
  24    >>> TechInfo.unique_techs()
  25    >>> TechInfo.unique_unit_upgrades()
  26    >>> TechInfo.town_center_techs()
  27    >>> TechInfo.blacksmith_techs()
  28    >>> TechInfo.monastery_techs()
  29    >>> TechInfo.university_techs()
  30    >>> TechInfo.eco_techs()
  31    >>> TechInfo.civilization_techs()
  32
  33    **Examples**
  34
  35    >>> TechInfo.LOOM.ID
  36    >>> 22
  37
  38    >>> TechInfo.LOOM.ICON_ID
  39    >>> 6
  40    """
  41
  42    @property
  43    def ID(self) -> int:
  44        """
  45        Returns:
  46            The ID of the specified tech
  47        """
  48        return self.value[0]
  49
  50    @classmethod
  51    def from_id(cls, tech_id: int) -> TechInfo:
  52        """
  53        Get the TechInfo object from its ID
  54
  55        Args:
  56            tech_id: The ID of the tech to get the TechInfo of
  57
  58        Returns:
  59            A TechInfo object of the specified tech ID
  60        """
  61        if tech_id < 0:
  62            raise ValueError(f"{tech_id} is not a valid tech id value")
  63        for x in cls._member_map_.values():
  64            if x.value[0] == tech_id:
  65                return x
  66
  67        raise KeyError(f"A technology with ID '{tech_id}' was not found in the dataset")
  68
  69    @property
  70    def ICON_ID(self) -> int:
  71        """
  72        Returns:
  73            The icon ID of the specified tech
  74        """
  75        return self.value[1]
  76
  77    @classmethod
  78    def from_icon_id(cls, tech_icon_id: int) -> TechInfo:
  79        """
  80        Get the TechInfo object from its icon ID
  81
  82        Args:
  83            tech_icon_id: The icon ID of the tech to get the TechInfo of
  84
  85        Returns:
  86            A TechInfo object of the tech with the specified icon ID
  87        """
  88        if tech_icon_id == -1:
  89            raise ValueError("-1 is not a valid icon_id value")
  90        for x in cls._member_map_.values():
  91            if x.value[1] == tech_icon_id:
  92                return x
  93
  94        raise KeyError(f"A technology with icon id '{tech_icon_id}' was not found in the dataset")
  95
  96    @staticmethod
  97    def unique_techs(
  98            exclude_castle_techs: bool = False,
  99            exclude_imp_techs: bool = False,
 100            include_chronicles: bool = False,
 101    ) -> List[TechInfo]:
 102        """
 103        Get the list of all the unique techs in the game
 104
 105        Args:
 106            exclude_castle_techs: if set to `True`,  exclude the castle age techs
 107            exclude_imp_techs: if set to `True`,  exclude the imperial age techs
 108            include_chronicles: if set to `True`, includes the chronicles techs
 109
 110        Returns:
 111            A list of TechInfo objects which are all the unique techs in the game
 112        """
 113        unique_techs = {
 114            "base": {
 115                "castle_age": [
 116                    TechInfo.ANARCHY,
 117                    TechInfo.ANDEAN_SLING,
 118                    TechInfo.ATLATL,
 119                    TechInfo.BALLISTAS,
 120                    TechInfo.BEARDED_AXE,
 121                    TechInfo.CIRCUMNAVIGATION,
 122                    TechInfo.CHATRAS,
 123                    TechInfo.CILICIAN_FLEET,
 124                    TechInfo.CHIEFTAINS,
 125                    TechInfo.CORVINIAN_ARMY,
 126                    TechInfo.DETINETS,
 127                    TechInfo.FIRST_CRUSADE,
 128                    TechInfo.GRAND_TRUNK_ROAD,
 129                    TechInfo.GREAT_WALL,
 130                    TechInfo.GREEK_FIRE,
 131                    TechInfo.HILL_FORTS,
 132                    TechInfo.HOWDAH,
 133                    TechInfo.HULCHE_JAVELINEERS,
 134                    TechInfo.INQUISITION,
 135                    TechInfo.IRONCLAD,
 136                    TechInfo.KAMANDARAN,
 137                    TechInfo.KASBAH,
 138                    TechInfo.KSHATRIYAS,
 139                    TechInfo.NOMADS,
 140                    TechInfo.MADRASAH,
 141                    TechInfo.MARAUDERS,
 142                    TechInfo.MEDICAL_CORPS,
 143                    TechInfo.PAIKS,
 144                    TechInfo.EUPSEONG,
 145                    TechInfo.PAVISE,
 146                    TechInfo.ROYAL_HEIRS,
 147                    TechInfo.SHATAGNI,
 148                    TechInfo.SILK_ARMOR,
 149                    TechInfo.SIPAHI,
 150                    TechInfo.STEPPE_HUSBANDRY,
 151                    TechInfo.STIRRUPS,
 152                    TechInfo.STRONGHOLD,
 153                    TechInfo.SVAN_TOWERS,
 154                    TechInfo.SZLACHTA_PRIVILEGES,
 155                    TechInfo.THALASSOCRACY,
 156                    TechInfo.TIGUI,
 157                    TechInfo.TUSK_SWORDS,
 158                    TechInfo.WAGENBURG_TACTICS,
 159                    TechInfo.YASAMA,
 160                    TechInfo.YEOMEN,
 161                    TechInfo.BIMARISTAN,
 162                    TechInfo.COILED_SERPENT_ARRAY,
 163                    TechInfo.TUNTIAN,
 164                    TechInfo.RED_CLIFFS_TACTICS,
 165                    TechInfo.FORTIFIED_BASTIONS,
 166                    TechInfo.LAMELLAR_ARMOR,
 167                    TechInfo.MALON,
 168                    TechInfo.HERBALISM,
 169                    TechInfo.CACIQUES,
 170                ],
 171                "imp_age": [
 172                    TechInfo.ARQUEBUS,
 173                    TechInfo.ARTILLERY,
 174                    TechInfo.ATHEISM,
 175                    TechInfo.AZNAURI_CAVALRY,
 176                    TechInfo.BAGAINS,
 177                    TechInfo.BOGSVEIGAR,
 178                    TechInfo.BURGUNDIAN_VINEYARDS,
 179                    TechInfo.CHIVALRY,
 180                    TechInfo.CRENELLATIONS,
 181                    TechInfo.COMITATENSES,
 182                    TechInfo.COUNTERWEIGHTS,
 183                    TechInfo.CUMAN_MERCENARIES,
 184                    TechInfo.FABRIC_SHIELDS,
 185                    TechInfo.FERETERS,
 186                    TechInfo.DOUBLE_CROSSBOW,
 187                    TechInfo.DRILL,
 188                    TechInfo.DRUZHINA,
 189                    TechInfo.HOLCANS,
 190                    TechInfo.FARIMBA,
 191                    TechInfo.FLEMISH_REVOLUTION,
 192                    TechInfo.FORCED_LEVY,
 193                    TechInfo.FRONTIER_GUARDS,
 194                    TechInfo.FUROR_CELTICA,
 195                    TechInfo.GARLAND_WARS,
 196                    TechInfo.HUSSITE_REFORMS,
 197                    TechInfo.KATAPARUTO,
 198                    TechInfo.LECHITIC_LEGACY,
 199                    TechInfo.LOGISTICA,
 200                    TechInfo.MAGHREBI_CAMELS,
 201                    TechInfo.MAHAYANA,
 202                    TechInfo.CITADELS,
 203                    TechInfo.MANIPUR_CAVALRY,
 204                    TechInfo.PAPER_MONEY,
 205                    TechInfo.PERFUSION,
 206                    TechInfo.RECURVE_BOW,
 207                    TechInfo.ROCKETRY,
 208                    TechInfo.HAUBERK,
 209                    TechInfo.SHINKICHON,
 210                    TechInfo.SILK_ROAD,
 211                    TechInfo.SUPREMACY,
 212                    TechInfo.TIMURID_SIEGECRAFT,
 213                    TechInfo.TORSION_ENGINES,
 214                    TechInfo.TOWER_SHIELDS,
 215                    TechInfo.WARWOLF,
 216                    TechInfo.WOOTZ_STEEL,
 217                    TechInfo.BOLT_MAGAZINE,
 218                    TechInfo.MING_GUANG_ARMOR,
 219                    TechInfo.SITTING_TIGER,
 220                    TechInfo.THUNDERCLAP_BOMBS,
 221                    TechInfo.ORDO_CAVALRY,
 222                    TechInfo.BUTALMAPU,
 223                    TechInfo.HUARACAS,
 224                    TechInfo.CURARE,
 225                ],
 226            },
 227            "chronicles": {
 228                "castle_age": [
 229                    TechInfo.SPARABARAS,
 230                    TechInfo.REED_ARROWS,
 231                    TechInfo.TAXIARCHS,
 232                    TechInfo.TRIERARCHIES,
 233                    TechInfo.HELOT_LEVIES,
 234                    TechInfo.XYPHOS,
 235                    TechInfo.VETERAN_CHILIARCHS,
 236                    TechInfo.ENDS_OF_THE_WORLD,
 237                    TechInfo.ODOMANTIAN_RAIDERS,
 238                    TechInfo.DII_PLUNDERERS,
 239                    TechInfo.VADHAVADHA,
 240                    TechInfo.LEAF_HEADED_SHAFTS,
 241                ],
 242                "imp_age": [
 243                    TechInfo.SCYTHED_CHARIOTS,
 244                    TechInfo.SAGARIS,
 245                    TechInfo.EISPHORA,
 246                    TechInfo.DELIAN_LEAGUE,
 247                    TechInfo.AGOGE,
 248                    TechInfo.PELOPONNESIAN_LEAGUE,
 249                    TechInfo.PEZHETAIROI,
 250                    TechInfo.SARISSOPHOROI,
 251                    TechInfo.BESSIAN_METALWORKING,
 252                    TechInfo.PELTASTS,
 253                    TechInfo.VEDIC_TEACHINGS,
 254                    TechInfo.SKANDHAVARAS,
 255                ],
 256            },
 257        }
 258
 259        techs_to_return = []
 260
 261        addons = ["base"]
 262        if include_chronicles:
 263            addons.append("chronicles")
 264
 265        for addon in addons:
 266            if not exclude_castle_techs:
 267                techs_to_return.extend(unique_techs[addon]["castle_age"])
 268            if not exclude_imp_techs:
 269                techs_to_return.extend(unique_techs[addon]["imp_age"])
 270
 271        return techs_to_return
 272
 273    @staticmethod
 274    def unique_unit_upgrades(
 275            exclude_castle_techs: bool = False,
 276            exclude_non_castle_techs: bool = False,
 277            include_chronicles: bool = False,
 278    ) -> List[TechInfo]:
 279        """
 280        Args:
 281            exclude_castle_techs: if set to `False`, excludes the castle unique unit techs from the list of techs returned
 282            exclude_non_castle_techs: if set to `False`, excludes the non castle unique unit techs from the list of techs
 283                returned
 284            include_chronicles: if set to `True`, includes the chronicles techs to the list of techs returned
 285
 286        Returns:
 287            A list of unique unite upgrade tech IDs
 288        """
 289        unique_techs = {
 290            "base": {
 291                "castle": [
 292                    TechInfo.ELITE_ARAMBAI,
 293                    TechInfo.ELITE_BALLISTA_ELEPHANT,
 294                    TechInfo.ELITE_BERSERK,
 295                    TechInfo.ELITE_BOYAR,
 296                    TechInfo.ELITE_CAMEL_ARCHER,
 297                    TechInfo.ELITE_CATAPHRACT,
 298                    TechInfo.ELITE_CENTURION,
 299                    TechInfo.ELITE_CHAKRAM_THROWER,
 300                    TechInfo.ELITE_CHU_KO_NU,
 301                    TechInfo.ELITE_COMPOSITE_BOWMAN,
 302                    TechInfo.ELITE_CONQUISTADOR,
 303                    TechInfo.ELITE_COUSTILLIER,
 304                    TechInfo.ELITE_GBETO,
 305                    TechInfo.ELITE_GENOESE_CROSSBOWMAN,
 306                    TechInfo.ELITE_GHULAM,
 307                    TechInfo.ELITE_HUSKARL,
 308                    TechInfo.ELITE_HUSSITE_WAGON,
 309                    TechInfo.ELITE_JAGUAR_WARRIOR,
 310                    TechInfo.ELITE_JANISSARY,
 311                    TechInfo.ELITE_KAMAYUK,
 312                    TechInfo.ELITE_KARAMBIT_WARRIOR,
 313                    TechInfo.ELITE_KESHIK,
 314                    TechInfo.ELITE_KIPCHAK,
 315                    TechInfo.ELITE_KONNIK,
 316                    TechInfo.ELITE_LEITIS,
 317                    TechInfo.ELITE_LONGBOWMAN,
 318                    TechInfo.ELITE_MAGYAR_HUSZAR,
 319                    TechInfo.ELITE_MAMELUKE,
 320                    TechInfo.ELITE_MANGUDAI,
 321                    TechInfo.ELITE_MONASPA,
 322                    TechInfo.ELITE_OBUCH,
 323                    TechInfo.ELITE_ORGAN_GUN,
 324                    TechInfo.ELITE_PLUMED_ARCHER,
 325                    TechInfo.ELITE_RATHA,
 326                    TechInfo.ELITE_RATTAN_ARCHER,
 327                    TechInfo.ELITE_SAMURAI,
 328                    TechInfo.ELITE_SERJEANT,
 329                    TechInfo.ELITE_SHOTEL_WARRIOR,
 330                    TechInfo.ELITE_TARKAN,
 331                    TechInfo.ELITE_TEUTONIC_KNIGHT,
 332                    TechInfo.ELITE_THROWING_AXEMAN,
 333                    TechInfo.ELITE_URUMI_SWORDSMAN,
 334                    TechInfo.ELITE_WAR_ELEPHANT,
 335                    TechInfo.ELITE_WAR_WAGON,
 336                    TechInfo.ELITE_WOAD_RAIDER,
 337                    TechInfo.ELITE_WHITE_FEATHER_GUARD,
 338                    TechInfo.ELITE_FIRE_ARCHER,
 339                    TechInfo.ELITE_TIGER_CAVALRY,
 340                    TechInfo.ELITE_IRON_PAGODA,
 341                    TechInfo.ELITE_LIAO_DAO,
 342                    TechInfo.ELITE_KONA,
 343                    TechInfo.ELITE_GUECHA_WARRIOR,
 344                    TechInfo.ELITE_BLACKWOOD_ARCHER,
 345                ],
 346                "non_castle": [
 347                    TechInfo.ELITE_CARAVEL,
 348                    TechInfo.ELITE_GENITOUR,
 349                    TechInfo.ELITE_LONGBOAT,
 350                    TechInfo.ELITE_TURTLE_SHIP,
 351                    TechInfo.HOUFNICE,
 352                    TechInfo.IMPERIAL_CAMEL_RIDER,
 353                    TechInfo.IMPERIAL_SKIRMISHER,
 354                    TechInfo.ELITE_SHRIVAMSHA_RIDER,
 355                    TechInfo.WINGED_HUSSAR,
 356                    TechInfo.ELITE_QIZILBASH_WARRIOR,
 357                    TechInfo.SAVAR,
 358                    TechInfo.ELITE_BOLAS_RIDER,
 359                    TechInfo.ELITE_TEMPLE_GUARD,
 360                    TechInfo.ELITE_IBIRAPEMA_WARRIOR,
 361                ],
 362            },
 363            "chronicles": {
 364                "castle": [
 365                    TechInfo.ELITE_IMMORTAL,
 366                    TechInfo.ELITE_STRATEGOS,
 367                    TechInfo.ELITE_HIPPEUS,
 368                    TechInfo.ELITE_COMPANION_CAVALRY,
 369                    TechInfo.ELITE_RHOMPHAIA_WARRIOR,
 370                    TechInfo.ELITE_PATTIYODHA_LONGBOWMAN,
 371                ],
 372                "non_castle": [
 373                    TechInfo.EPHORATE,
 374                    TechInfo.MORAI,
 375                    TechInfo.ELITE_PHALANGITE,
 376                    TechInfo.ELITE_SANNAHYA,
 377                ],
 378            }
 379        }
 380
 381        techs_to_return = []
 382
 383        addons = ["base"]
 384        if include_chronicles:
 385            addons.append("chronicles")
 386
 387        for addon in addons:
 388            if not exclude_castle_techs:
 389                techs_to_return.extend(unique_techs[addon]["castle"])
 390            if not exclude_non_castle_techs:
 391                techs_to_return.extend(unique_techs[addon]["non_castle"])
 392
 393        return techs_to_return
 394
 395    @staticmethod
 396    def town_center_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 397        """
 398        Args:
 399            ages: a list of age IDs (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 400                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 401
 402        Returns:
 403            A list of TechInfo objects which are the blacksmith upgrade techs for the given age
 404        """
 405        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 406
 407        upgrades = {
 408            Age.DARK_AGE: [
 409                TechInfo.LOOM,
 410                TechInfo.FEUDAL_AGE,
 411            ],
 412            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: [
 413                TechInfo.WHEELBARROW,
 414                TechInfo.TOWN_WATCH,
 415                TechInfo.CASTLE_AGE,
 416            ],
 417            Age.CASTLE_AGE: [
 418                TechInfo.HAND_CART,
 419                TechInfo.TOWN_PATROL,
 420                TechInfo.IMPERIAL_AGE,
 421            ],
 422            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: [],
 423        }
 424
 425        techs_to_return = []
 426        for age in ages:
 427            techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age])
 428
 429        return techs_to_return
 430
 431    @staticmethod
 432    def blacksmith_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 433        """
 434        Args:
 435            ages: a list of age IDs (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 436                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 437
 438        Returns:
 439            A list of TechInfo objects which are the blacksmith upgrade techs for the given age
 440        """
 441        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 442
 443        upgrades = {
 444            Age.DARK_AGE: [],
 445            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: [
 446                TechInfo.FORGING,
 447                TechInfo.SCALE_MAIL_ARMOR,
 448                TechInfo.SCALE_BARDING_ARMOR,
 449                TechInfo.FLETCHING,
 450                TechInfo.PADDED_ARCHER_ARMOR,
 451            ],
 452            Age.CASTLE_AGE: [
 453                TechInfo.IRON_CASTING,
 454                TechInfo.CHAIN_MAIL_ARMOR,
 455                TechInfo.CHAIN_BARDING_ARMOR,
 456                TechInfo.BODKIN_ARROW,
 457                TechInfo.LEATHER_ARCHER_ARMOR,
 458            ],
 459            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: [
 460                TechInfo.BLAST_FURNACE,
 461                TechInfo.PLATE_MAIL_ARMOR,
 462                TechInfo.PLATE_BARDING_ARMOR,
 463                TechInfo.BRACER,
 464                TechInfo.RING_ARCHER_ARMOR,
 465            ],
 466        }
 467
 468        techs_to_return = []
 469        for age in ages:
 470            techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age])
 471
 472        return techs_to_return
 473
 474    @staticmethod
 475    def monastery_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 476        """
 477        Args:
 478            ages: The age ID (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 479                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 480
 481        Returns:
 482            A list of TechInfo objects which are the monastery upgrade techs for the given age
 483        """
 484        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 485
 486        upgrades = {
 487            Age.DARK_AGE: [],
 488            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: [],
 489            Age.CASTLE_AGE: [
 490                TechInfo.REDEMPTION,
 491                TechInfo.ATONEMENT,
 492                TechInfo.HERBAL_MEDICINE,
 493                TechInfo.HERESY,
 494                TechInfo.SANCTITY,
 495                TechInfo.FERVOR,
 496                TechInfo.DEVOTION,
 497            ],
 498            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: [
 499                TechInfo.FAITH,
 500                TechInfo.ILLUMINATION,
 501                TechInfo.BLOCK_PRINTING,
 502                TechInfo.THEOCRACY,
 503            ],
 504        }
 505
 506        techs_to_return = []
 507        for age in ages:
 508            techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age])
 509
 510        return techs_to_return
 511
 512    @staticmethod
 513    def university_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 514        """
 515        Args:
 516            ages: The age ID (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 517                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 518
 519        Returns:
 520            A list of TechInfo objects which are the university upgrade techs for the given age
 521        """
 522        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 523
 524        upgrades = {
 525            Age.DARK_AGE: [],
 526            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: [],
 527            Age.CASTLE_AGE: [
 528                TechInfo.MASONRY,
 529                TechInfo.FORTIFIED_WALL,
 530                TechInfo.BALLISTICS,
 531                TechInfo.GUARD_TOWER,
 532                TechInfo.HEATED_SHOT,
 533                TechInfo.CAREENING,
 534                TechInfo.MURDER_HOLES,
 535                TechInfo.CLINKER_CONSTRUCTION,
 536                TechInfo.TREADMILL_CRANE,
 537                TechInfo.SIPHONS,
 538            ],
 539            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: [
 540                TechInfo.ARCHITECTURE,
 541                TechInfo.SIEGE_ENGINEERS,
 542                TechInfo.KEEP,
 543                TechInfo.ARROWSLITS,
 544                TechInfo.DRY_DOCK,
 545                TechInfo.SHIPWRIGHT,
 546                TechInfo.CARVEL_HULL,
 547                TechInfo.INCENDIARIES,
 548                TechInfo.CHEMISTRY,
 549                TechInfo.BOMBARD_TOWER,
 550            ],
 551        }
 552
 553        techs_to_return = []
 554        for age in ages:
 555            techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age])
 556
 557        return techs_to_return
 558
 559    @staticmethod
 560    def eco_techs(ages: int | List[int] = None, buildings: int | List[int] = None) -> List[TechInfo]:
 561        """
 562        Args:
 563            ages: The age ID (IDs are located in the Age IntEnum dataset). If specified, only techs from these
 564                ages are returned. If unspecified, all ages' techs are returned
 565            buildings: The building ID for which the upgrades are needed. If unspecified, eco upgrades from all
 566                economic buildings (Mill, Mining Camp, Lumber Camp, Town Center and Market) are returned
 567
 568        Returns:
 569            A list of TechInfo objects which are the eco upgrade techs for the given age
 570        """
 571        ages = list(Age) if ages is None else listify(ages)
 572
 573        if buildings is None:
 574            buildings = [
 575                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID,
 576                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID,
 577                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID,
 578                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID,
 579                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID,
 580            ]
 581        else:
 582            buildings = listify(buildings)
 583
 584        upgrades = {
 585            Age.DARK_AGE: {
 586                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID: [],
 587                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID: [],
 588                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID: [],
 589                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID: [TechInfo.LOOM],
 590                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID: [],
 591            },
 592            Age.FEUDAL_AGE: {
 593                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID: [TechInfo.HORSE_COLLAR, TechInfo.DOMESTICATION],
 594                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.GOLD_MINING, TechInfo.STONE_MINING],
 595                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.DOUBLE_BIT_AXE],
 596                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID: [TechInfo.WHEELBARROW, TechInfo.TOWN_WATCH],
 597                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID: [],
 598            },
 599            Age.CASTLE_AGE: {
 600                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID: [TechInfo.HEAVY_PLOW, TechInfo.PASTORALISM],
 601                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.GOLD_SHAFT_MINING, TechInfo.STONE_SHAFT_MINING],
 602                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.BOW_SAW],
 603                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID: [TechInfo.HAND_CART, TechInfo.TOWN_PATROL],
 604                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID: [TechInfo.COINAGE, TechInfo.CARAVAN]
 605            },
 606            Age.IMPERIAL_AGE: {
 607                BuildingInfo.MILL.ID: [TechInfo.CROP_ROTATION, TechInfo.TRANSHUMANCE],
 608                BuildingInfo.MINING_CAMP.ID: [],
 609                BuildingInfo.LUMBER_CAMP.ID: [TechInfo.TWO_MAN_SAW],
 610                BuildingInfo.TOWN_CENTER.ID: [],
 611                BuildingInfo.MARKET.ID: [TechInfo.BANKING, TechInfo.GUILDS],
 612            },
 613        }
 614
 615        techs_to_return = []
 616        for age in ages:
 617            for building in buildings:
 618                techs_to_return.extend(upgrades[age][building])
 619
 620        return techs_to_return
 621
 622    @staticmethod
 623    def civilization_techs(include_chronicles: bool = False) -> List[TechInfo]:
 624        """
 625        Args:
 626            include_chronicles: if set to `True`, includes the chronicles techs to the list of techs returned
 627        Returns:
 628            A list of TechInfo objects which represent all civ 'upgrades'. Can be used to detect which civ is being
 629            played by the player using the 'researched technology' condition.
 630        """
 631        base_techs = [
 632            TechInfo.ARMENIANS,
 633            TechInfo.AZTECS,
 634            TechInfo.BENGALIS,
 635            TechInfo.BERBERS,
 636            TechInfo.BOHEMIANS,
 637            TechInfo.BRITONS,
 638            TechInfo.BULGARIANS,
 639            TechInfo.BURGUNDIANS,
 640            TechInfo.BURMESE,
 641            TechInfo.BYZANTINES,
 642            TechInfo.CELTS,
 643            TechInfo.CHINESE,
 644            TechInfo.CUMANS,
 645            TechInfo.DRAVIDIANS,
 646            TechInfo.ETHIOPIANS,
 647            TechInfo.FRANKS,
 648            TechInfo.GEORGIANS,
 649            TechInfo.GOTHS,
 650            TechInfo.GURJARAS,
 651            TechInfo.HINDUSTANIS,
 652            TechInfo.HUNS,
 653            TechInfo.INCA,
 654            TechInfo.ITALIANS,
 655            TechInfo.JAPANESE,
 656            TechInfo.KHMER,
 657            TechInfo.KOREANS,
 658            TechInfo.LITHUANIANS,
 659            TechInfo.MAGYARS,
 660            TechInfo.MALAY,
 661            TechInfo.MALIANS,
 662            TechInfo.MAYA,
 663            TechInfo.MONGOLS,
 664            TechInfo.PERSIANS,
 665            TechInfo.POLES,
 666            TechInfo.PORTUGUESE,
 667            TechInfo.ROMANS,
 668            TechInfo.SARACENS,
 669            TechInfo.SICILIANS,
 670            TechInfo.SLAVS,
 671            TechInfo.SPANISH,
 672            TechInfo.TATARS,
 673            TechInfo.TEUTONS,
 674            TechInfo.TURKS,
 675            TechInfo.VIETNAMESE,
 676            TechInfo.VIKINGS,
 677            TechInfo.SHU,
 678            TechInfo.WU,
 679            TechInfo.WEI,
 680            TechInfo.JURCHENS,
 681            TechInfo.KHITANS,
 682            TechInfo.MAPUCHE,
 683            TechInfo.MUISCA,
 684            TechInfo.TUPI,
 685        ]
 686        chronicles_techs = [
 687            TechInfo.ACHAEMENIDS,
 688            TechInfo.ATHENIANS,
 689            TechInfo.SPARTANS,
 690            TechInfo.MACEDONIANS,
 691            TechInfo.THRACIANS,
 692            TechInfo.PURU,
 693        ]
 694        if include_chronicles:
 695            base_techs.extend(chronicles_techs)
 696        return base_techs
 697
